rules.name: Outbound Connection to Known C2 IP
rules.author: Splunk Threat Research Team
rules.content:
index=network sourcetype=firewall dest_ip="45.155.205.233"
| stats count values(src_ip) as sources by dest_ip
| where count > 0

rules.name: PowerShell Download Cradle Execution
rules.author: Splunk Threat Research Team
rules.content:
index=endpoint sourcetype=xmlwineventlog EventCode=4104
| search ScriptBlockText="*IEX*" OR ScriptBlockText="*DownloadString*"
| stats count by host, ScriptBlockText
